## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are grounded in real usage (not theoretical)
- [ ] Methodology voice is consistent (direct, practical, no corporate language)
- [ ] If adding an eval assertion: includes rationale for why this signal matters
- [ ] If modifying the mental model: MENTAL-MODEL.md is updated
- [ ] Tested locally (if modifying eval script): `bash eval-research-artifact.sh test-artifact.md`
